title: wollastonia biflora var. biflora
intro: Wollastonia biflora var. biflora is a plant species native to Southeast Asia, commonly known as the Asian winged bitter tea or winged bitter tea. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and lowering blood sugar levels. Wollastonia biflora var. biflora can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for its medicinal uses, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
